title: AI Resume Screening System with Chatbot Integration
description: Developing a comprehensive web application to revolutionize recruitment by automating resume screening and enhancing candidate engagement. This system leverages advanced AI/NLP to accurately parse resumes, semantically match candidates to job descriptions, and provide explainable, bias-mitigated scores. It features a proactive, AI-driven chatbot offering real-time resume feedback to candidates before submission, alongside robust HR tools for collaborative evaluation and intelligent insights.

title: Endee Network Map
description: A full-stack AI web application that converts uploaded documents into an interactive semantic knowledge graph. It uses vector embeddings and semantic similarity to discover relationships between concepts, stores them in Endee, and visualizes the result as an explorable network for intelligent knowledge discovery.

title: Terms and Conditions Summarizer using n8n
description: A RAG-powered automation project that scrapes Terms and Conditions pages, cleans the extracted content, and generates concise plain-language summaries from a provided URL. It combines n8n workflows with Python-based retrieval and summarization, plus a simple Flask interface for user interaction.
